TextView.android:text: Save for your future goals and university events
Halfway done! Rs.17,000 left to reach your Annual Education Trip goal.
Save Rs.3,000/month to hit your Graduation Ceremony target.
Only Rs.17,000 more to reach your Annual Education Trip goal!
Set aside a fixed amount every week automatically.
Use scholarship funds for long-term goals first.
Cut one dining-out per week to save Rs.800–1,200/month.
